text: The New TestamentAuthorized King James Version, 1611Early Modern English Facsimile from the 1833 Oxford Exact Reprint
Language note: This is Early Modern English, not Anglo-Saxon Old English.

Source basis: public-domain Internet Archive scan of the 1833 Oxford exact reprint of the 1611 Authorized Version. The 1833 reprint uses Roman type while preserving the original 1611 spelling and page layout more readably than the black-letter first printing.
Format note: To avoid transcription and OCR errors, this Word document uses page-image facsimiles of the New Testament pages rather than a retyped modern text.
Scholarly caution: For word-level quotation, verify against the page image itself and, where necessary, the original 1611 black-letter facsimile.
Source confidence: High for page-image facsimile reproduction; not an independently collated critical transcription.
